selected_dialects.reason: Base plate and rectangular fins are prismatic; extrude_rectangle and linear pattern cover the core geometry.
Fins must be positioned at 12mm pitch across the plate; composition handles linear_pattern_component and boolean_union of fin bodies.
6mm mounting holes at four corners require circular cut profiles on the base plate, covered by sketch_profile hole operations.

safety_notes: Generative CAD output is reference geometry only; not validated for thermal performance, structural integrity, or manufacturing.
